text_excerpt: Surgeries & Events – Nia Griffith MP Tel.:01554 756374 Nia Griffith MP Member of Parliament for Llanelli / Aelod Seneddol dros Lanelli Home News Surgeries & Events About Nia Griffith Llanelli Cymraeg Contact Nia Sign up for updates Privacy policy Surgeries & Events Home > Surgeries & Events I hold regular advice surgeries on Fridays and I am always happy to arrange an appointment for you in person, on the phone or as an online meeting at a time which is convenient to you. Please contact my office by email or phone to arrange to arrange.
